calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Vicki Mack, CSR: Kathy Kollehner CSR 4102
Appearances:
Attorney for Petitioners: Siu L. Ma, Esq.
Petitioners: Weiquan Zhang, father, and Bin Dong, mother, present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor from Vivian Dong to VIVIAN JIANG.
Decree signed in open court.
